instructions: OpenCode skill tool: stage skills are mirrored under .opencode/skills/<name>/ (sync from skill/ via scripts/sync-opencode-skills.ps1 or scripts/sync-opencode-skills.sh). Load a stage with the skill tool using the YAML `name` (e.g. design-check, slice-implement). The umbrella index is this instruction file skill/SKILL.md — do not duplicate it under .opencode/skills.
